inst✝ : Arch

state✝ : SystemState := x✝
rmwWrites : List Request := ⋯
state : SystemState
rmwWrite previousWrite : Request
otherWrites : List Request := ⋯
failedWriteBetween : Bool := ⋯
failedOtherRMW : Bool := ⋯
failed : Bool := ⋯
rmwWrite' : Request := ⋯
removedWrites : List Request := ⋯
removed' : List Request := ⋯
requestsRemoved : RequestArray := ⋯
requests' : RequestArray := ⋯
⊢ ∀ (id : RequestId), id ∈ List.map Request.id removed' → id ∈ reqIds requests'

failed_attempts: ∀ (id : RequestId), id ∈ List.map Request.id removed' → id ∈ reqIds requests'
∀ (id : RequestId), id ∈ List.map Request.id removed' → id ∈ reqIds requests'

by
                  intro id h
                  simp only [List.mem_map, exists_prop] at h
                  have h₁ : ∃ (r : Request), r ∈ (removedWrites ++ state.removed) ∧ r.id = id := by
                    simpa [List.mem_toList, List.mem_map] using h
                  simp_all [Request.id_injEq]
                  <;>
                  (try aesop) <;>
                  (try
                    {
                      simp_all [List.mem_toList, List.mem_map, List.mem_append, List.mem_singleton]
                      <;>
                      aesop
(let removedIDs := (removed' : List Request).map Request.id; for (id : RequestId) (_ : id ∈ removedIDs) , id ∈ state.requests.idSet)

λ id h => by
    have h₁ : id ∈ List.map Request.id removed' := h
    have h₂ : id ∈ List.map (fun r : Request => r.id) removed' := by simpa [List.map] using h₁
    have h₃ : ∃ (r : Request), r ∈ removed' ∧ r.id = id := by
      have h₄ : id ∈ List.map (fun r : Request => r.id) removed' := h₂
      simp only [List.mem_map] at h₄
      obtain ⟨r, hr, rfl⟩ := h₄
      exact ⟨r, hr, rfl⟩
    obtain ⟨r, hr, rfl⟩ := h₃
    have h₄ : r ∈ removed' := hr
    have h₅ : r.id ∈ reqIds requests' := by
      have h₆ : r ∈ removedWrites ∪ state.removed := by
        -- Prove that r is in removedwrites ∪ state.removed
        simp only [removed', List.mem_append, List.mem_map, List.mem_toArray] at h₄
        simp only [removedWrites, List.mem_filter, List.mem_range] at h₄
        -- Use the fact that removed' is constructed from removedwrites and state.removed
        aesop
      -- Use the fact that removedwrites and state.removed are subsets of the original requests
      simp only [removedWrites, List.mem_filter, List.mem_range] at h₆
      simp only [reqIds, List.mem_map, List.mem_range] at *
      -- Use the fact that r is in the original requests
      aesop
    exact h₅

by
                 intro id h
                 -- If we can find an id in removed', it must be in reqIds requests'
                 have h₁ : id ∈ List.map Request.id removed' := h
                 simp_all [List.mem_map]
                 <;>
                 (try
                   simp_all [List.mem_map, List.mem_toList]) <;>
                 (try
                   {
                     aesop
                   }) <;>
                 (try
                   {
                     ring_nf at *
                     <;> simp_all [List.mem_map, List.mem_toList]
                     <;> aesop

by
                   intro id h
                   have h₁ : id ∈ List.map Request.id removed' := h
                   have h₂ : id ∈ List.map Request.id removed' → id ∈ reqIds requests' := by
                     intro h
                     simp only [List.mem_map] at h
                     rcases h with ⟨r, hr, hrid⟩
                     have h₃ : r ∈ removed' := hr
                     have h₄ : id = r.id := by simp_all
                     have h₅ : r.id ∈ reqIds requests' := by
                       by_cases h₆ : failed
                       · -- Case: failed = true
                         simp_all [reqIds, List.mem_map]
                         <;> (try { contradiction }) <;> (try { aesop })
                         <;> (try {
                           simp_all [ reqIds, List.mem_map ]
